comments.text: ChatGPT points out the edge case that for $\alpha=1/2$, it's not possible for both colors to have more than $\alpha \binom{\lvert X\rvert}{2}$ edges.
True - I assume that $\leq 1/2$ is a typo in [Er90b] (given that generally he was thinking more about the behaviour as $\alpha \to 1/2$).
